anytime: Smile, it looks great on you!
You make this house a home.
Today is going to be a great day!
You are loved more than you know.
Every day with you is a gift.
You bring sunshine wherever you go!
morning: A great day starts with a great attitude!
Morning! Go out there and crush it!
The early bird gets the worm — you've got this!
Good morning! Make it a day to remember.
afternoon: Keep up the great work this afternoon!
Hope your day is going wonderfully!
evening: Hope you had an amazing day!
Time to relax — you earned it!
Good evening! Rest up for another great day tomorrow.
You made it through another awesome day!
Evening time — you deserve to unwind.
snow: It's a snow day — hot cocoa time!
Snow is just winter's way of having fun!
Perfect day to stay cozy inside.
Let it snow, let it snow, let it snow!
rain: Rainy days are perfect for staying cozy.
Every rainy day ends with sunshine.
The plants are loving this weather!
A little rain never hurt anyone — stay dry!
day_cloudy: Every cloud has a silver lining!
No sun needed — you light up the room!
day_sunny: Perfect weather to get outside and enjoy!
Soak up that vitamin D today!
thunderstorm: Perfect weather to curl up with a good movie.
Thunder only happens when it's raining — stay dry!
fog: A little mystery in the air today!
